source: case demo workflow taxonomy; mirrors the current resources-page case-study filters

ICT、智能制造与硬科技.notes: Cloud/AI platform cases route to 科技与互联网; industrial, robotics, agriculture, quality-inspection, and equipment cases route to 制造与供应链.

泛家居、建筑与环保.notes: Home-furnishing design and store conversion route to 消费与零售; environmental equipment and industrial optimization route to 制造与供应链.

零售、服饰与大消费.notes: Private-domain, member, live-commerce, content, store, and selection cases should usually use 增长与市场 as the primary capability.

医疗健康与生物医药.notes: Clinical, doctor, imaging, report, triage, and medical workflow cases route to 数字化与 AI; patient lifecycle and private-domain conversion can add 增长与市场.

教育、培训与人力资源.notes: Education and tutoring route to 教育与文化; recruiting, RPO, and talent matching route to 专业服务. HR/recruiting cases usually add 组织与人才.

供应链、物流与平台电商.notes: Procurement, routing, warehousing, and logistics route to 制造与供应链; social commerce and distribution growth route to 消费与零售.

专业服务、咨询与媒体直播.notes: Consulting, RPO, media/live-commerce services route to 专业服务; asset allocation or investment research can add 金融与投资.

rules.case_industry_count: one primary industry; add notes if multiple industries are plausible
rules.case_capability_count: one primary capability plus optional secondary capabilities
rules.taxonomy_change_policy: Do not edit the canonical industries/capabilities during a run. Write proposed additions to taxonomy_change_proposals.md.
